description: SEO MCP server for creators. Ranks Google Search Console opportunities by ad revenue, not clicks.
name: io.github.Yoshyaes/creator-seo-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to your OAuth 2.0 credentials.json downloaded from Google Cloud Console.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Your display ad RPM in USD (e.g. 22 for Mediavine). Used to weight opportunities by estimated revenue.
environmentVariables.name: CREATOR_SEO_SITE_RPM

environmentVariables.description: JSON map of URL path prefix to affiliate revenue multiplier. Example: {"gaming-deals": 2.0}
environmentVariables.name: CREATOR_SEO_AFFILIATE_CATEGORIES

title: Creator SEO MCP
